$comment: The only place in this repo where a model identifier may appear (outside historical docs — FableEtudes/, docs/archive/, STATUS.md's dated journal, which are never rewritten). Consumed by the CI guard workflows (wired in étude 25 lot 5) and the pre-commit hook (lot 4). Bumping a model for a role = editing this file only. Values below are iso-current: extracted from the workflows/hook that already hardcode them, no behavior change on creation (étude 25 lot 2).

second-avis.status: dormant — Q-3 différée le 2026-07-19 (étude 25) ; activer = renseigner provider/model + secret CI
